column4:
How mentally demanding was the task?
정신적으로 얼마나 힘들게 수행하였습니까?
column5:
How physically demanding was the task?
신체적으로 얼마나 힘들게 수행하였습니까?
column6:
How hurried or rushed was the pace of the task?
이 일을 수행하기 위해 얼마나 서둘렀습니까?
column7:
How successcul were you in accomplishing what you were asked to do?
얼마나 성공적으로 일을 수행했습니까?
column8:
How hard did you have to work to achieve your level of performance?
원하는 수준의 성과를 달성하기 위해 얼마나 노력 했습니까?
column9:
How insecure, discourage, irritate, stressed and annoyed wereyou?
얼마나 불안, 낙담, 스트레스, 짜증을 받았습니까?
